## Source: ossf-package-analysis (7b638ac33d4412bfc3c7d3bc1d5f935f1966b743badfe353e134ff907d3e1b8f)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'nintendoamerica-ncom' @ 1.0.5 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
